Payload.Name: Habitat Gravity Tolerance
Payload.Description: Reinforces structural and life-support systems so that infrastructure can be designed for a wider band of surface gravity around Earth-normal (9.81 m/s²). Each level extends the design's allowed half-width by ~0.49 m/s² (5% of Earth gravity), from ±0.98 m/s² at L0 to ±2.45 m/s² at L3.

Payload.Name: Low-Gravity Habitat Engineering
Payload.Description: Permits infrastructure to function on low-gravity bodies — asteroids, comets, and small moons — far below the band general tolerance research alone allows. Each of the 5 levels lowers the achievable minimum by an additional ~1.96 m/s² (20% of Earth gravity), reaching 0 m/s² at the highest level.

Payload.Name: High-Gravity Habitat Engineering
Payload.Description: Permits infrastructure to function on heavy worlds far beyond the band general tolerance research alone allows. The 5 levels follow a phased curve — early levels add modest headroom, later levels unlock dramatic gains, reaching ~100 m/s² at the highest level. Per-level deltas (m/s²): +3.5, +10.5, +17.6, +24.6, +31.6.

Payload.Name: Habitat Pressure Tolerance
Payload.Description: Improves seal, regulator, and life-support engineering so that infrastructure can be designed for a wider band of atmospheric pressure around Earth-normal. Each level extends the design's allowed half-width by 0.05 (from 0.10 at L0 to 0.25 at L3).

Payload.Name: Thin-Atmosphere Habitat Engineering
Payload.Description: Lets infrastructure operate in near-vacuum atmospheres below what general tolerance research alone allows. Each level lowers the achievable minimum by an additional 0.05 (up to 0.25 below the standard floor).

Payload.Name: Dense-Atmosphere Habitat Engineering
Payload.Description: Lets infrastructure operate in high-pressure atmospheres above what general tolerance research alone allows. Each level raises the achievable maximum by an additional 0.05 (up to 0.25 above the standard ceiling).

Payload.Name: Mining Production Efficiency
Payload.Description: Annual production of accessibility 1.0 minerals for each mine or automated mine. Small amounts of lower accessibility minerals will be produced; half annual rate for 0.5 accesssibility, one tenth annual rate for 0.1 accessibility, etc.

Payload.Name: Advanced Battery Technology
Payload.Description: Utilizes advanced materials and manufacturing techniques to exponentially increase battery energy density, reaching a threefold increase at its peak.

Payload.Name: Alcubierre Miniaturization
Payload.Description: Research into shrinking a drive to fit smaller form factors

Payload.Name: Alcubierre Bubble Creation Cost
Payload.Description: By finding better ways to manipulate the warp bubble, we can make the drive more efficient

Payload.Name: Alcubierre Sustain Cost
Payload.Description: By finding better ways to manipulate the warp bubble, we can make the drive more efficient

Payload.Name: Alcubierre Collapse Efficency
Payload.Description: We can recover some of the energy put into creating the bubble when we collapse it in a controlled manner

Payload.Name: Rocket Engine Maximum Power
Payload.Description: Research to increase the upper limits of conventional rocket power

Payload.Name: Rocket Engine Minimum Power
Payload.Description: Research to find the lower limits of conventional rocket power

Payload.Name: Rocket Engine Maximum Size
Payload.Description: Research into better cooling allows larger engine sizes

Payload.Name: Rocket Engine Minimum Size
Payload.Description: Research into miniaturization allows smaller engine sizes

Payload.Name: Rocket Engine Exhaust Velocity
Payload.Description: Research into higher exhaust velocities for engines, making them more efficient

Payload.Name: Rocket Engine Fuel Consumption
Payload.Description: Research into better plumbing and pump layouts allows better fuel efficiency

Payload.Name: JumpPoint Stabilization
Payload.Description: A ship equipped with this module can Stabilise a JumpPoint

Payload.Name: JumpPoint Size Reduction
Payload.Description: Reduces the size of a component required for Jump Point Stabilisation

Payload.Name: JumpPoint Time Reduction
Payload.Description: Reduces the time it takes to stabilise a Jump Point

Payload.Name: High Explosives
Payload.Description: Better explosive compounds increase the Relative effectiveness factor

Payload.Name: HE Warheads
Payload.Description: High Explosive Warheads that produce a large amount of heat and pressure

Payload.Name: Fragmentation Warheads
Payload.Description: Warheads that produce a large amount of fragmentation

Payload.Name: Fission Warheads
Payload.Description: Warheads that produce massive amounts of Heat and pressure

Payload.Name: Laser Warheads
Payload.Description: Smart warheads that fire a high energy beam towards the target on detonation

Payload.Name: Trigger Tech
Payload.Description: Enables different warhead triggers for ordnance

Payload.Name: Guidance Tech
Payload.Description: Enables different guidance options ordnance

Payload.Name: Antenna Sensitivity
Payload.Description: Improvements to antennas to increase the ability to pick up smaller signals from background noise

Payload.Name: Antenna Efficiency
Payload.Description: Improvements to antennas increase the effective area of a sensor, allowing for greater sensitivity for a smaller size

Payload.Name: Antenna Bandwidth
Payload.Description: Improvements to antennas increase the max bandwidth of an antenna

Payload.Name: Modern Technology
Payload.Description: Unlocks all modern technologies needed for space flight and exploration

Payload.Name: Factory Maximum Size
Payload.Description: Research into the logistics and design of larger factories

Payload.Name: Beam Focusing Range
Payload.Description: Research into keeping a beam coherent over greater distance — raises the maximum range a beam-weapon design can reach. The developer's rule made real: 'long range is earned, not given.' A starting laser is a short-legged knife-fighter; research is what climbs it toward sci-fi reach.

Payload.Name: Kinetic Yield
Payload.Description: Research into denser projectiles and higher launch energies — raises the maximum kinetic energy per shot a slug-thrower design can reach. A type-based weapon tech (kinetic), setting-agnostic: it lifts the ceiling for any railgun/mass-driver, on a ship or a ground mount. A starting slug hits modestly; research is what makes it a capital-scale round.

Payload.Name: Shipyard Slip Maximum Size
Payload.Description: Research into the logistics and design of larger slips for shipyards

Payload.Name: Geological Surveyor
Payload.Description: Research into geological surveys of system bodies

Payload.Name: Gravitational Surveyor
Payload.Description: Research into surveying gravitational anomalies

Payload.Name: Solar Panel Efficiency
Payload.Description: Improves the base absorption efficiency of solar panels

Payload.Name: Solar Panel Bandwidth
Payload.Description: Increases the maximum tunable bandwidth for solar panels

Payload.Name: Solar Panel Density
Payload.Description: Reduces the mass per square meter of solar panels

Payload.Name: Thermal Shielding
Payload.Description: Heat-resistant hull plating developed from studying stellar thermal environments. Unlocks nickel-steel armour, which sheds the heat of a corona or hot nebula.

Payload.Name: Radiation Shielding
Payload.Description: Dense radiation-absorbing hull plating developed from studying solar flares and stellar radiation belts. Unlocks tungsten radiation plating, whose high-Z mass shields a ship's crew and systems from the ionising radiation of a flare.

Payload.Name: Ablative Plating
Payload.Description: Sacrificial carbon-composite hull plating developed from studying debris fields and micrometeoroid streams. Unlocks ablative composite armour, which sheds the kinetic impacts of debris by ablating away its surface.

Payload.Name: Corrosion Plating
Payload.Description: Passivated corrosion-resistant hull plating developed from studying corrosive nebulae. Unlocks corrosion-resistant alloy armour, which shrugs off the chemical attack of a dense medium.

Payload.Name: EM Hardening
Payload.Description: Faraday shielding mesh developed from studying ion storms and electromagnetic interference. Unlocks EM shielding mesh armour, which grounds out the surges of an ion storm before they reach a ship's systems.

Payload.Name: Structural Reinforcement
Payload.Description: High-tensile internal framing developed from studying gravimetric anomalies. Unlocks reinforced trusswork armour, which holds a hull together against the tidal stress of a spacetime anomaly.
